title: Transparent Manu Background
description: Makes all menu background transparent by removing the dirt background
body:
# Warning This was made to fix a mod issue and will have a glitch without the mod
![glitch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ac5bad5b428cc081673c9c2ae68a9247f2d3d4a.png)
Removes the dirt png from the manu backgrounds to make it transparent
### Incompatible with **fabric** , **quilt** , **Forge**
Fixes **[AcryliCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/acrylicraft)** Texturepack screen not working
[![Transparent background texturepack pack screen fix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39641ac97e3109d57e4eb63e7ea6bf10ef16ee8e.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/acrylicraft)
Make this screen Transparent
![Transparent background texturepack pack acreen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8180c4919db8c45f267c9931e4cef4da880ce44.png)
